name: severino-obsidian
description: Obsidian plugin suite for the vault: site-accurate writeup preview + authoring power-ups.

commands.name: build
commands.summary: Bundle the plugin into the vault (site renderer + base.css inlined).

commands.name: dev
commands.summary: Watch-rebuild into the vault on change.

commands.name: commands:emit
commands.summary: Render the cordon-v4 command contract from src/commands.mjs.

commands.name: commands:check
commands.summary: Fail if the committed command contract is stale.
